subscribe.title: Choose Your Plan
subscribe.faq1Q: Can I cancel at any time?
subscribe.faq1A: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. It will remain active until the end of the paid period.
subscribe.faq2A: Yes, payment is processed via Paddle — one of the world's largest payment platforms.
subscribe.faq3Q: What is the difference between plans?
subscribe.faq3A: The main difference is the number of active services and priority ranking in search results.
subscribe.paymentSetupMsg:
Payment system is being finalized. Available soon.

Contact us for early subscription.
subscribe.errCannotOpen: Could not open the payment page
subscribe.cliqPaymentSub: Instant CliQ Transfer · Activated within 1 hour
subscribe.trialActivated: 🎉 Trial activated! You can now submit offers on requests.
subscribe.faq2A_cliq: Payment is via CliQ instant transfer through your banking app. Support will send the account details in the chat, and your subscription is activated within 1 hour after confirming the transfer.
subscribe.faq3A_cliq: The main difference is the monthly bid credits and search ranking priority. The trial plan is free once per provider.
